title: AIIMS Nagpur – Tutor/Demonstrator – 2 Posts

basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Nagpur Tutor/Demonstrator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Nagpur (AIIMS Nagpur) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Tutor/Demonstrator. Candidates Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 18-05-2026, and closes on 01-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through AIIMS Nagpur official website.

age_limit.age_details: Not exceeding 30 years as on 01st June 2026. Relaxation for ST/SC: 05 years, OBC: 03 years. PwD: up to 10 years (General), 13 years (OBC), 15 years (SC/ST).

qualification.education_qualification: Medical qualification included in the I or II Schedule or part II of the third schedule to the Indian Medical Council Act of 1956. Must have completed one year of Compulsory Internship. For Non-Medical Candidates: Postgraduate qualification e.g. Master's degree in the Discipline /allied subject.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 01-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Nagpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.
